words.definition_vi: 1) (động từ) làm tăng/trầm trọng thêm; 2) (danh từ) hợp chất; 3) (tính từ) phức tạp, gồm nhiều phần
words.definition_en: 1) to make worse; 2) a substance made of two or more elements; 3) composed of multiple parts
words.example_sentence: The economic crisis was compounded by rising unemployment and inflation, creating a compound problem that required immediate government intervention.

words.definition_vi: 1) (động từ) nhượng bộ, chịu thua; 2) (danh từ) sản lượng, năng suất; 3) (động từ) cho ra, sinh lợi
words.definition_en: 1) to give way; 2) the amount of product obtained; 3) to produce profit or result
words.example_sentence: Farmers must yield to new agricultural regulations, though modern farming techniques yield higher crop production per hectare.

words.definition_vi: 1) tham gia, liên quan; 2) thu hút sự chú ý; 3) (quân sự) giao tranh; 4) cam kết
words.definition_en: 1) to participate; 2) to attract attention; 3) to enter into combat; 4) to pledge
words.example_sentence: The company aims to engage customers through interactive social media campaigns while employees engage in professional development programs.

words.definition_vi: 1) (động từ) căng thẳng, gây áp lực; 2) (danh từ) chủng loại, dòng; 3) (danh từ) sự căng thẳng, áp lực
words.definition_en: 1) to put pressure on; 2) a variety or breed; 3) stress or tension
words.example_sentence: The pandemic strained healthcare systems worldwide, while a new viral strain emerged, creating additional strain on medical resources.

words.definition_vi: 1) (động từ) kêu gọi, yêu cầu; 2) (danh từ) sức hấp dẫn; 3) (pháp lý) kháng cáo
words.definition_en: 1) to make a request; 2) attractiveness or charm; 3) a legal challenge to a decision
words.example_sentence: The charity made an appeal for donations, and the campaign's emotional appeal resonated with donors, though the defendant filed an appeal in court.

words.definition_vi: 1) (danh từ) chủ đề, môn học; 2) (động từ) làm cho phải chịu; 3) (tính từ) phụ thuộc vào
words.definition_en: 1) a topic of study; 2) to cause to undergo; 3) dependent on or liable to
words.example_sentence: The history subject was made more engaging, though students were subjected to rigorous exams, and grades remained subject to teacher evaluation.

words.definition_vi: 1) (danh từ) vật thể, đối tượng; 2) (động từ) phản đối, không đồng ý
words.definition_en: 1) a physical thing; 2) to express disagreement
words.example_sentence: The main object of the study was to understand climate change, though some scientists objected to the methodology used in the research.

words.definition_vi: 1) (danh từ) hợp đồng; 2) (động từ) co lại, rút gọn; 3) (động từ) mắc bệnh
words.definition_en: 1) a legal agreement; 2) to become smaller; 3) to acquire an illness
words.example_sentence: The company signed a lucrative contract with the government, though the economy began to contract, and workers contracted COVID-19 during the pandemic.

words.definition_vi: 1) (động từ) dẫn đường; 2) (danh từ) vị trí dẫn đầu; 3) (danh từ) chất chì; 4) (động từ) chỉ huy
words.definition_en: 1) to guide; 2) a position in front; 3) the metal element; 4) to direct
words.example_sentence: The team leader will lead the project, maintaining their lead in the competition, while engineers removed lead from old pipes and lead poisoning became a public health concern.

words.definition_vi: 1) (động từ) từ chối, không chịu; 2) (danh từ) rác thải, chất thải
words.definition_en: 1) to decline or reject; 2) waste material or garbage
words.example_sentence: The government refused to implement stricter environmental policies, while cities struggled to manage refuse disposal and recycling programs.

words.definition_vi: 1) (động từ) cho phép; 2) (danh từ) giấy phép, chứng chỉ
words.definition_en: 1) to allow; 2) an official document granting permission
words.example_sentence: The law permits citizens to vote at age eighteen, though applicants must obtain a work permit before employment, and weather conditions permit outdoor construction.

words.definition_vi: 1) (động từ) sản xuất, tạo ra; 2) (danh từ) nông sản, sản phẩm nông nghiệp
words.definition_en: 1) to manufacture or create; 2) agricultural products
words.example_sentence: Factories produce consumer goods efficiently, while farmers produce fresh vegetables and fruits for local markets.

words.definition_vi: 1) (động từ) ghi lại, ghi âm; 2) (danh từ) hồ sơ, kỷ lục; 3) (danh từ) đĩa nhạc
words.definition_en: 1) to document or capture; 2) a documented fact or achievement; 3) a vinyl disc
words.example_sentence: Scientists record data meticulously, and the research broke a world record, while the musician released a new record album last month.

words.definition_vi: 1) (tính từ) rất nhỏ, tế nhị; 2) (danh từ) phút, khoảnh khắc; 3) (danh từ) biên bản họp
words.definition_en: 1) extremely small; 2) a unit of time; 3) official notes of a meeting
words.example_sentence: The scientist examined minute details under a microscope, taking only a minute to record the findings in the meeting minutes.

words.definition_vi: 1) (danh từ) nước mắt; 2) (động từ) xé rách, rách; 3) (danh từ) vết rách
words.definition_en: 1) a drop of liquid from the eye; 2) to rip or damage; 3) a rip or hole
words.example_sentence: The emotional film brought tears to viewers' eyes, while the accident caused a tear in the fabric, and the paper began to tear easily.

words.definition_vi: 1) (danh từ) gió; 2) (động từ) quấn, cuộn; 3) (động từ) uốn lượn
words.definition_en: 1) moving air; 2) to wrap around; 3) to follow a winding path
words.example_sentence: Strong wind damaged buildings along the coast, while hikers had to wind their way up the mountain, and the road began to wind through the forest.

words.definition_vi: 1) (động từ) đánh bóng, làm sáng; 2) (danh từ) chất đánh bóng; 3) (tính từ) liên quan đến Ba Lan; 4) (động từ) hoàn thiện
words.definition_en: 1) to make smooth and shiny; 2) a substance for shining; 3) relating to Poland; 4) to refine
words.example_sentence: Workers polish the marble floors daily, while the author continued to polish her manuscript, and Polish immigrants contributed significantly to the community.

questions.question_text: The economic crisis was compounded by rising unemployment. What does 'compounded' mean in this context?
questions.explanation: Trong ngữ cảnh này, 'compounded' là động từ có nghĩa 'làm tăng/trầm trọng thêm'. Các lựa chọn B, C, D là những nghĩa khác của từ này nhưng không phù hợp với bối cảnh kinh tế.

questions.question_text: The farmer's yield increased significantly after adopting new techniques. Which word is closest in meaning to 'yield'?
questions.explanation: 'Yield' trong ngữ cảnh nông nghiệp có nghĩa 'sản lượng, năng suất'. Option A (nhượng bộ) là nghĩa khác của từ này nhưng không phù hợp ở đây.

questions.question_text: The company refused to implement stricter environmental policies. What is the opposite of 'refused' in this sentence?
questions.explanation: 'Refused' (từ chối) có antonym là 'accepted' (chấp nhận). Các lựa chọn khác không phải là đối nghĩa trực tiếp.

questions.question_text: The law permits citizens to vote at age eighteen. In this sentence, 'permits' most closely means ___.
questions.explanation: 'Permits' là động từ có nghĩa 'cho phép, cho phép'. Option B (allows) là đồng nghĩa chính xác nhất. Option A (requires) có nghĩa ngược lại.

questions.question_text: The scientist examined minute details under the microscope. What does 'minute' mean here?
questions.explanation: 'Minute' (phát âm /ˈmɪnɪt/) khi dùng tính từ có nghĩa 'rất nhỏ, tế nhị'. Đây là một từ nhiều nghĩa dễ gây nhầm lẫn với 'minute' (phút).

questions.question_text: The emotional film brought tears to viewers' eyes, while the accident caused a tear in the fabric. Which statement is correct?
questions.option_b: The first 'tears' refers to liquid from eyes; the second refers to a rip
questions.option_c: Both 'tears' are nouns with identical meanings
questions.option_d: The second 'tears' is a verb meaning to damage
questions.explanation: 'Tear' là từ nhiều nghĩa: /teə/ (nước mắt) và /ter/ (xé rách). Trong câu, 'tears' đầu tiên là danh từ (nước mắt), 'tear' thứ hai là danh từ (vết rách). Đây là bẫy phổ biến trong đề thi.

questions.question_text: The road began to wind through the forest. What is the best synonym for 'wind' in this context?
questions.explanation: 'Wind' (phát âm /waɪnd/) khi là động từ có nghĩa 'uốn lượn, đi theo đường quanh co'. Option A là danh từ (gió), không phù hợp.

questions.question_text: The author continued to polish her manuscript before submission. Which meaning of 'polish' is used here?
questions.explanation: Trong ngữ cảnh viết lách, 'polish' có nghĩa 'hoàn thiện, cải thiện'. Option A là nghĩa chữ nghĩa nhưng không phù hợp với bối cảnh này.
